name: Sensitive Data Exposure (Information Leakage in Responses)
description: Detects sensitive information leakage in HTTP responses including API keys, database connection strings, internal IP addresses, stack traces, and debug information that should not be exposed to clients.
author: AC3 ScanForge
remediation: Remove all debug information, stack traces, and verbose error messages from production responses. Never expose API keys, database credentials, or internal IP addresses. Implement proper error handling that returns generic error messages to clients.

intelligence.dfirRelevance: Information leakage is a critical reconnaissance enabler. Exposed database connection strings and API keys provide direct access. Internal IP addresses reveal network topology for lateral movement planning.
